015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022
023/**
024 * Subclass of {@link Parser} for byte-based parsers.
025 *
026 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
027 * <p>
028 * This class is typically the parent class of all character-based parsers.
029 * It has 1 abstract method to implement on the session object...
030 * <ul>
031 *    <li><c>parse(ParserSession, ClassMeta)</c>
032 * </ul>
033 *
034 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
035 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
036 * </ul>
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
040
041 * </ul>
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "java:S115" // ARG_xxx constants use camelCase after prefix intentionally (constructor arg name keys, not enum-style constants)
045})
046public class InputStreamParser extends Parser {
047
048   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
049
050   /**
051    * Builder class.
052    */
053   @SuppressWarnings({
054      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
055   })
056   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends Parser.Builder<SELF> {
057
058      /**
059       * Constructor, default settings.
060       */
061      protected Builder() {}
062
063      /**
064       * Copy constructor.
065       *
066       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
067       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
068       */
069      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
070         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
071      }
072
073      /**
074       * Copy constructor.
075       *
076       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
077       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
078       */
079      protected Builder(InputStreamParser copyFrom) {
080         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
081      }
082
083      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
084      public InputStreamParser build() {
085         return build(InputStreamParser.class);
086      }
087
088      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
089      public abstract SELF copy();
090
091
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link InputStreamParser#create()} / {@link InputStreamParser#copy()} path.
096    */
097   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
098
099      DefaultBuilder() {}
100
101      DefaultBuilder(InputStreamParser copyFrom) {
102         super(copyFrom);
103      }
104
105      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
106         super(copyFrom);
107      }
108
109      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
110      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
111         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
112      }
113   }
114
115   /**
116    * Creates a new builder for this object.
117    *
118    * @return A new builder.
119    */
120   @SuppressWarnings({
121      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
122   })
123   public static Builder<?> create() {
124      return new DefaultBuilder();
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * Constructor.
129    *
130    * @param builder The builder for this object.
131    */
132   protected InputStreamParser(Builder<?> builder) {
133      super(builder);
134   }
135
136   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
137   public InputStreamParserSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
138      return InputStreamParserSession.create(this);
139   }
140
141   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
142   public InputStreamParserSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
143
144   @Override /* Overridden from Parser */
145   public final boolean isReaderParser() { return false; }
146
147   /**
148    * Binary input format.
149    *
150    * <p>
151    * Resolves from the configured {@link MarshallingContext#getBinaryFormat()}.
152    *
153    * @return The binary wire format used by this parser.
154    */
155   protected final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat() { return getMarshallingContext().getBinaryFormat(); }
156}
